channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-05 06:10 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla...
item.description: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla chip research fab will have all the machines needed to do logic, memory, packing & masks in one building for a lightning fast development cycle. Heaven 💫

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine is embarrassingly fun. Creative mode? Activated. You blink. There’s a full anime scene ...
item.description: Grok Imagine is embarrassingly fun. Creative mode? Activated. You blink. There’s a full anime scene staring back.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon’s data centers are absolute units
item.description: Elon’s data centers are absolute units

item.title: @elonmusk: ChatGPT literally just flagged the Seven Last Words of Jesus on Good Friday....hit a policy violatio...
item.description: ChatGPT literally just flagged the Seven Last Words of Jesus on Good Friday....hit a policy violation & marked it as "dangerous" 🤦 My friend was just doing sermon research. That's it. But here's the wild part..... ChatGPT has no problem giving a step-by-step guide for suicide… yet somehow a quote from the Bible is marked as harmful and blocked as a policy violation Make it make sense...ChatGPT is just utterly woke AI 🤡

item.title: @elonmusk: Gavin Newsom's State Medicaid program ‘Medi-Cal’ is losing $146 BILLION per year to fraud. The level...
item.description: Gavin Newsom's State Medicaid program ‘Medi-Cal’ is losing $146 BILLION per year to fraud. The level of fraud in California is insane.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨“WE GOT HIM! My fellow Americans, over the past several hours, the United States Military pulled of...
item.description: 🚨“WE GOT HIM! My fellow Americans, over the past several hours, the United States Military pulled off one of the most daring Search and Rescue Operations in U.S. History, for one of our incredible Crew Office Members, who also happens to be a highly respected Colonel, and who I am thrilled to let you know is SAFE and SOUND!” - President Donald J. Trump 🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX now has over 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit, which is honestly an absurd engineering ach...
item.description: SpaceX now has over 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit, which is honestly an absurd engineering achievement. And no, they are not just up there freelancing and hoping for the best. They stay separated because they are placed in organized orbital lanes, constantly tracked, and able to maneuver when needed. Starlink also uses automated collision-avoidance systems, which is how a constellation this large can operate without turning low Earth orbit into a scrapyard. It’s already the closest thing in the world to a true work-anywhere network and they are just getting started.

item.title: @elonmusk: Global sales of gas cars peaked the year the Tesla Model 3 entered volume production Guess what happ...
item.description: Global sales of gas cars peaked the year the Tesla Model 3 entered volume production Guess what happens next?

item.title: @elonmusk: Another Grok Imagine upgrade. Update now. Everything’s tighter. Subtle movement lands. It just flows...
item.description: Another Grok Imagine upgrade. Update now. Everything’s tighter. Subtle movement lands. It just flows. Details lock in. xAI engineers showing off.@Grok
